rationale: Pickling DBRef raises traceback; Python-specific serialization bug, no spec-defined behavior involved.

Routing improvement to skip broken slaves in MasterSlaveConnection; implementation quality, no spec rule.
Documentation improvement for building/testing with extensions on Windows; docs-only change.
Build tooling fix: setup.py should surface extension build errors; no spec or driver behavior involved.
Datetime values off by one day on insert; BSON spec requires UTC milliseconds encoding, driver encodes incorrectly.
Restoring pool_size option removed in 1.4; internal connection pool configuration, no spec rule involved.
Permanent failure state after election due to wrong socket in pool; implementation bug, no specific SDAM rule named.
Integer overflow in request ID causes AssertionError after millions of requests; internal arithmetic bug.
Driver hangs on stale config without recovery; no spec rule on stale-config retry behavior contradicted.
Feature addition: slaveOk flag at cursor level; not fixing a spec violation, just adding capability.
Documentation error: wrong module path listed for ObjectId; docs-only bug.
int32/int64 BSON type mapping undocumented; documentation gap, not a behavioral spec violation.
Feature addition: slaveOk at database and collection levels; not fixing a spec violation.
Internal refactor: move URI parser to its own module; no behavior change, no spec rule involved.
Connection doesn't reconnect to original host after disconnect; internal behavior, no spec rule contradicted.
Feature addition: safe mode at Connection/DB/Collection levels; adding capability, not fixing a spec violation.
Feature addition: direct_only option to force connecting to specified server; no spec rule involved.
GridOut missing file-like methods (close, fileno); API ergonomics improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Make cursors context managers via Python with-statement; Python API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Add helper to list installed SONManipulators; Python-specific API ergonomics, no spec involvement.
Easier API for fsync-lock/unlock; feature request, mentions all drivers but no specific behavioral inconsistency.
system_js item assignment broken; Python-specific __setitem__ API bug, no spec rule involved.
Tailable cursor should block instead of raising StopIteration; cursor behavior enhancement, no spec rule named.
C extension _cmessage not imported due to broken import; internal regression in build/extension loading.
ValueError decoding datetime on 32-bit PyPy; platform-specific crash, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
find_and_modify with fields param returns only _id; fields projection incorrectly sent to server, violating CRUD spec.
RuntimeError from modifying set during iteration in __find_node; Python threading/concurrency bug, no spec rule.
Feature: map_reduce out parameter accept string or object for new server option; feature addition, not spec nonconformance.
Add cursor.add_option/remove_option for query flags; Python API feature addition, no spec rule involved.
Collection.reIndex() method missing; feature gap, not a spec conformance violation per spec rule.

Pooling and reconnection with auth broken; very thin description, cannot identify specific spec rule violated.
Misleading error message when connecting to slave; error message quality improvement, no spec rule involved.
Install failures on base EC2 Ubuntu AMI due to missing gcc/python-dev; build/packaging issue.
Feature: disable SONManipulators on find; Python-specific API feature, no spec rule involved.
map/reduce error messages should expose JS assertion detail; error message improvement, no spec rule.
Server assertion during update not propagated as exception; server-side error handling, no specific spec rule named.

batch_size not sent as numToReturn in wire protocol; spec defines numToReturn = min(batch_size, limit), driver sends 0.
GridIn.close triggers spurious update due to __setattr__ interaction; internal Python implementation bug.
Cursor freezes after 101 results during getMore; performance/blocking issue, no specific cursor spec rule violated.
Feature: support ContinueOnError flag for inserts (MongoDB 2.0); new server feature support, not fixing existing violation.
Feature: support read preference tagging for MongoDB 2.0; new server feature addition, not a spec violation.

Simplify _closed() function by removing broken sock.recv() call; internal code quality refactor.
connectTimeoutMS and socketTimeoutMS URI options not supported; connection string spec defines these options.
GridFS queries fail against slave due to ensure_index write; mentions PHP-136 as parallel issue, not a cross-driver inconsistency.
